subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Object of all desire, Who, on the Day of Rising, through His Most Exalted Word, laid bare the hidden thoughts of hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که در یوم قیام بکلمه علیا خافیه صدور و خائنه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @wisdom [hikmat]
